title: Malaysian-Style Fried Plantains
description: A simple and flavorful dessert made with plantains, inspired by Malaysian cuisine. The combination of sweet and crispy textures is a delight to the senses.
instructions: Peel the plantains and cut them into 1-inch rounds.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Add the plantain slices and fry until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the plantains from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Sprinkle the sugar over the plantains and toss to coat.
Drizzle the bitter over the plantains and toss to combine.
Garnish with crisp and serve immediately.
